ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the stock exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the stock exchange */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Time when the stock exchange opens */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Time when the stock exchange closes */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Total market capitalization of the stock exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stock exchange */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., AAPL, GOOG) */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date of the stock */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of the stock price */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades */,
  "weighted_avg_price" REAL /* Weighted average price of the stock */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* Time interval for the price data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock price */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock price was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geolocation of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered, expired) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the alert should be checked */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert that was triggered */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "trigger_price" REAL /* Price that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert when it was triggered */,
  "user_notification" TEXT /* Whether the user was notified (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was notified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange_info" (
  "info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each info entry */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "info_key" TEXT /* Key of the information (e.g., address, phone number) */,
  "info_value" TEXT /* Value of the information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_exchange_info_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_info" (
  "info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each info entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "info_key" TEXT /* Key of the information (e.g., industry, sector) */,
  "info_value" TEXT /* Value of the information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_info_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_daily" (
  "daily_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily stock price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "num_trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades */,
  "weighted_avg_price" REAL /* Weighted average price of the stock */,
  "change_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-Earnings ratio */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings Per Share */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("daily_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_daily_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_sector_performance" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the sector (e.g., 0.05 for 5% increase) */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Total trading volume of the sector */,
  "num_stocks" INTEGER /* Number of stocks in the sector */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)
